texto: Whatever comes our way, whatever battle we have raging inside of us, we always have a choice. It is our choices that makes us who we are, and we always have a choice to do what's right ~ Let love and forgiveness reign.
explicacao: Citação de Spiderman 3 sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Whatever comes our way, whatever battle we have raging inside of us, we always have a choice. It …” articula reflexao, forgiveness, whatever em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
